signals.headline: Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple Launches Digital Asset Accounts and Unified Treasury | YES | MED confidence**  
Ripple announced native digital asset capabilities in Ripple Treasury, integrating XRP and RLUSD balances with cash in real-time treasury management—the first of its kind.[2]  
This enhances institutional utility amid XRP's price at $1.31 (down 0.63% in last 24h), targeting short-term resistance at $1.4–$1.6.[2]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41.64M for Week Ending April 16 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot ETFs saw $41.64 million in net inflows—the largest single-week inflow in three months and a 254% jump from the prior week's $11.75 million—driving XRP's 12.5% surge from April lows to around $1.44, with cumulative inflows at $1.26 billion.[1]
